content.en:
"Your Excellency, what the hell is this place?"

Ye Tian asked again.

This time, the Yuan Xu Realm Lord introduced: "This is the Abyss of Eternal Night, the Abyss of Eternal Night is very large, in addition to you and me, there are some other existences at the peak of the Nine Realms that have fallen here, and some are even completely crazy, unlike me, they will occasionally be sober." "

Ye Tian asked the Yuan Xu Realm Lord many more questions, but the other party did not answer seriously, after all, he had nothing to do with the Yuan Xu Realm Lord, and the other party was still jealous of him, so naturally he would not respond seriously.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian began to wander around in the Abyss of Eternal Night, and gradually encountered other Nine Realms peak existences trapped here, each of them had extremely high ultimate rules, and they all walked through the Eternal Night Ultimate System.

After all, here, there is no other choice than to comprehend the Eternal Night Ultimate System.

In their opinion, perhaps the Eternal Night Ultimate System has come to an end, even if they have not broken through to become the Ultimate Realm Master, there is still a glimmer of hope to escape from here, which is also their only hope of survival.

"All the Nine Realms peak powerhouses trapped here have extremely high Eternal Night Ultimate Rule Realm, and one of them has even comprehended the Eightfold Ultimate Rule. "

Ye Tian felt that this was not normal, maybe there were items or places here that could allow them to quickly comprehend the 11 Extreme Rules of the Eternal Night.

Finally this day.

Ye Tian saw an extremely dark stone, which seemed to be the source of all the Eternal Night Ultimate System.

And here, there are still three Nine Realms peak existences who are contemplating enlightenment, obviously they have not given up comprehending the Eternal Night Ultimate System, and they are still thinking about going out.

Ye Tian sat cross-legged and began to comprehend this black stone.

Suddenly, he found that as soon as his ultimate will came into contact with this stone, his thinking and understanding seemed to be improved a lot, and he spied into the source of the power of the eternal night ultimate system.

"If you go through the Eternal Night Ultimate System, it is the most efficient to comprehend this stone. "

However, with the help of this black stone, it is also possible to comprehend the Yuanxing Ultimate System, and the effect is also quite good.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian comprehended the black stone to comprehend the Yuanxing Ultimate System, which was much faster than the usual comprehension of the Yuanxing Ultimate System, second only to using the Demon Whisker Vine to comprehend.

If you have been here for countless years, you will be able to slowly improve the Extreme Rules of the Abyssal Star, and if you comprehend the Sevenfold Ultimate Rules or even the Eightfold Ultimate Rules, there should be no problem.

These Nine Realm peaks did not have the ultimate talent, and they were all able to comprehend the sevenfold or even eightfold ultimate rules, so it would naturally be easier for him.

So, in the following years, Ye Tian was here to comprehend the ultimate rules of the Yuanxing.

In a flash, 300 million yuan years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's Yuanxing Ultimate Rule broke through, from the fivefold realm to the sixfold realm, and his strength was also improved.

However, if you want to cultivate from the Sixfold Abyss Star Ultimate System to the Sevenfold Abyss Star Ultimate System, it will be very difficult.

Ye Tian had fully comprehended the billion-dollar domain years, and only then did he successfully comprehend the ultimate rules of the Sevenfold Abyss Star.

"Continue to improve the Yuanxing Ultimate System, this black stone is not very useful, it will take too long years, maybe I can also cultivate the third Ultimate System!"

Ye Tian decided.

Those Ultimate Realm Masters all wanted to cultivate one Ultimate System after another, although he did not break through to become the Ultimate Realm Master, but if he embarked on the three Ultimate Systems, his strength would also be superimposed.

"Then start researching the Eternal Night Ultimate System!"

Ye Tianshen was in the Abyss of Eternal Night, and this black stone, as well as those Nine Realms pinnacles who had embarked on the Abyss Star Ultimate System as a reference, they might not be willing to trade the Eternal Night Ultimate System to pass it on to him, but if they continued to fight, they could understand the Eternal Night Ultimate System more and more.

After a period of time, Ye Tian has grown step by step from the Eternal Night Ultimate System, and his body has begun to become the ultimate of the Eternal Night Ultimate System, and he has easily created the ultimate dimensional killing move of the Eternal Night Ultimate System-Eternal Night Phantom.

This ultimate dimensional move can make him faster, more ghostly, and more suitable for combat.

After that, Ye Tian practiced the body of the Eternal Night Ultimate, and then began to continuously improve the Eternal Night Ultimate System, and then tried to comprehend the rules of the Eternal Night Ultimate.

And just like that, a long time passed.

Airplanes!!!!

Ye Tian's body is permeated with the Eternal Night Ultimate Rules, which also means that his Eternal Night Ultimate System has been completely perfected, followed by the Eternal Night Ultimate Rules.

A Eternal Night Ultimate Rule!

Double Eternal Night Ultimate Rule!

Triple Eternal Night Ultimate Rule!

With this black stone as a comprehension, coupled with the fact that his comprehension potential is extremely high, and he has a large number of ultimate talents, the efficiency of comprehension is very fast, far surpassing other powerhouses.

When Ye Tian's Eternal Night Ultimate Rule reached the fivefold realm, the efficiency was much slower, and it would take a long time to upgrade to the sixfold ultimate rule.

But Ye Tian was not in a hurry at all and continued to comprehend.

Anyway, it was just a copy of his body that was trapped here, so he naturally didn't panic.

When Ye Tian was comprehending the Eternal Night Ultimate Rule, the other three Nine Realm Peak Beings who were comprehending the Eternal Night Ultimate Rule immediately panicked.

"Oh no, it's time, it's coming!"

Whew!!!

They quickly fled, and Ye Tian didn't know why 703, but he also left, after all, this was obviously a crisis, and he didn't want to sacrifice this replica body.

Soon.

Ye Tian sensed a huge creature, shrouded in darkness, but he sensed the terrifying power of the Ultimate Rule from its body.

"What is this?"

Ye Tian asked other powerhouses.

A strong man who was still awake said: "This is the beast of the eternal night, it will come every once in a while, it will stay near the stone of the eternal night, if you anger it, it will definitely be killed." Although it has not reached the Ultimate Realm Lord realm, its combat power is definitely not inferior to that of the weaker Ultimate Realm Lord. We are far from being its opponents, there was once an existence who comprehended the rules of the Ninefold Eternal Night Ultimate, and the Eternal Night Ultimate Body was perfect, and tried to challenge it, but it was swallowed by it in one gulp. "

"Beast of the Eternal Night!"

Ye Tian was still a little far away from the other party, and now he could spy far away with the help of the ultimate rules of the eternal night, and the environment of the abyss of eternal night could not restrict him, but his copying talent was suppressed and could not envelop the other party.

"The Beast of the Eternal Night definitely contains the ultimate talent of the eternal night, if I copy it, I can comprehend the ultimate rules of the eternal night faster!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

It was an opportunity and he didn't want to miss it.

So, instead of running away, he flew to the beast of the eternal night.
